---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a protocol, RFC, or capability for Wren
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What should Wren do**
A clear description of the capability — and the **RFC / standard** it implements,
if any.

**Use case**
What problem does it solve? Where would it run (edge, backbone, embedded in
Sentinel, ...)?

**Scope / sketch**
Which crate(s) it touches, and roughly how it fits the existing architecture
(library decides, runner does I/O).

**Alternatives**
Other ways to achieve the same thing, and why this is preferable.
